title: Submission rate limit (~10 jobs/min per VPS) + 10,000 queue cap — pace batch loops
summary: The SpiderMaps submit route is rate-limited to ~10 jobs/min per VPS and the Maps queue caps at 10,000 jobs. A tight loop of single submissions (the recommended batch path) will hit the rate limit and get 429s. Pace the loop (~6-7s between submits) or honor the X-RateLimit-Reset header. This is separate from Google's ban cooldowns — this limit is SpiderIQ's own submission throttle.
references: app/api/v1/jobs/spidermaps.py:123 — route description: 'Per-VPS rate limit applies (10 jobs/min)'
app/api/v1/jobs/common.py:215,267 — X-RateLimit-Reset header on the submit responses
